info.name: Estimate the likelihood of a VA patient's eligibility for community care based on their Integrated Control Number (ICN) and requested medical service.

params.name: serviceType
params.description: The patient's desired medical service type for community care

params.name: extendedDriveMin
params.description: Optional extended drive-radius to include more VA medical facilities in response. This does not change overall eligibility and must exceed standard drive time for the service-type.)
